title: LootCrate
description: A Minecraft lootbox plugin with placeable crate chests, 25 opening animations, customizable keys, and full NBT item support. Edit crates by breaking them in creative mode, manage rewards with shift-click, and customize everything through the GUI.
body:
**LootCrates** is a fully-featured crate/lootbox plugin for Paper 1.21.1 servers that lets you create custom reward crates players can open with keys.

# Features

- **Placeable Crates** - Place crate chests in your world with floating hologram text above them
- **25 Opening Animations** - Choose from Classic, Spiral, Galaxy, Dragon, Phoenix, Glitch, and 19 more unique animations
- **Unlimited Custom Crates** - Create as many crate types as you want with custom names, colors, and settings
- **Full NBT Support** - Add any item as a reward including enchanted items, custom model data, and items with lore
- **Customizable Keys** - Change key materials and names for each crate type
- **Weighted Rewards** - Set rarity weights to control drop chances
- **In-Game Editor** - Edit everything through GUIs, no config editing required. Break a crate in creative mode to open the editor, shift-click items to quickly add rewards

# Commands

- `/lootcrate` - Player commands for viewing crates and history
- `/lcadmin give <player> <crate>` - Give crate items
- `/lcadmin givekey <player> <crate>` - Give keys
- `/lcadmin edit` - Open crate editor

# Permissions

- `lootcrates.use` - Open crates
- `lootcrates.admin` - Admin commands and crate placement

# Requirements

No dependencies required - works standalone on any Paper 1.21.1+ server.
